description: Les résidents du Sucre vous proposent un voyage sonore techno et house jusqu'au bout de la nuit.

Des spectacles pluridisciplinaires en prise avec le monde contemporain.

description: Join ESN for a visit to the Resistance and Deportation History Centre in 7th district of Lyon. During the Second World War, Lyon was the capital city of French resistance networks. Clandestine newspapers, courage and figures like Jean Moulin were the key words of this dark period. Located in the former Gestapo headquarters, this visit is a meaningful diving into Lyon's history at war and a deep moment to understand the path to freedom. Saturday, March 14th : 13h to 14h45 / 1pm to 2:45pm 📍Centre
lieu_nom: Centre d’Histoire de la Résistance et de la Déportation (14 Av. Berthelot, 69007 Lyon) 🚇 Métro A (P
